sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81109" key="periatmismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιατμισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n81109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">steaming</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.39</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
